image:image.image:title: Jack Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Jack Test: Assessing hindfoot and subtalar flexibility in cases of flexible flatfoot.Evaluating the mechanical

image:image.image:title: Ankle Range of Motion Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ankle Range of Motion: Measuring the degrees of movement available at the ankle joint.

image:image.image:title: Ankle Anterior Drawer Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ankle Anterior Drawer Test: Diagnosing injuries to the Anterior Talofibular Ligament (ATFL).Assessing ankle instability.

image:image.image:title: Deltoid Ligament Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Deltoid Ligament Test: Assessing the medial ligaments (Deltoid ligament) of the ankle.

image:image.image:title: Heel Thump Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Heel Thump Test: Screening for tibial stress fractures.Differentiating between a high ankle sprain (syndesmosis) and

image:image.image:title: Homans Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Homans Sign: Screening for Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT).

image:image.image:title: Mortons Neuroma Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Mortons Neuroma Test: Detecting Morton's Neuroma (pinched nerve between toes).

image:image.image:title: Ankle Posterior Drawer Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ankle Posterior Drawer Test: Assessing the Posterior Talofibular Ligament (PTFL) and posterior instability.

image:image.image:title: Ramirez Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ramirez Test: Testing for Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT).

image:image.image:title: Talar Tilt Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Talar Tilt Test: Assessing the Calcaneofibular Ligament (CFL).Checking for lateral ankle instability.

image:image.image:title: Thompson’s Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Thompson’s Test: Identifying a complete rupture of the Achilles Tendon.

image:image.image:title: External Rotation Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for External Rotation Test: Diagnosing syndesmosis injuries (High Ankle Sprain).

image:image.image:title: Squeeze Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Squeeze Test: Diagnosing syndesmotic ankle sprains (High Ankle Sprain).Assessing the integrity of the interosseous

image:image.image:title: Matles Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Matles Test: Visual assessment for Achilles Tendon Rupture.

image:image.image:title: Elbow Valgus Stress Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Elbow Valgus Stress Test: Assessing the integrity of the Medial Ulnar Collateral Ligament (UCL).Primary test for medial elbow

image:image.image:title: Milking Maneuver Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Milking Maneuver: Detecting partial tears or insufficiency of the Posterior Band of the UCL.

image:image.image:title: Moving Valgus Stress Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Moving Valgus Stress Test: Diagnosing chronic UCL tears, specifically in overhead athletes (baseball pitchers).

image:image.image:title: Elbow Lateral Pivot-Shift Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Elbow Lateral Pivot-Shift Test: Diagnosing Posterolateral Rotatory Instability (PLRI).Assessing the Lateral Ulnar Collateral Ligamen

image:image.image:title: Hook Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Hook Test: Diagnosing complete avulsion of the Distal Biceps Tendon.

image:image.image:title: Ruland Biceps Squeeze Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ruland Biceps Squeeze Test: Diagnosing Distal Biceps Tendon Rupture (similar to the Thompson test for the ankle).

image:image.image:title: The Chair Push-up Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for The Chair Push-up Test: Assessing Posterolateral Rotatory Instability (PLRI) and Radial Collateral Ligament insufficiency.

image:image.image:title: Cozen's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Cozen's Test: Diagnosing Lateral Epicondylalgia (Tennis Elbow).

image:image.image:title: Golfer's Elbow Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Golfer's Elbow Test: Diagnosing Medial Epicondylitis (Golfer's Elbow).

image:image.image:title: Mill's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Mill's Test: Diagnosing Lateral Epicondylitis (Tennis Elbow) via passive stretching.

image:image.image:title: Maudsley's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Maudsley's Test: Diagnosing Lateral Epicondylitis (Tennis Elbow).

image:image.image:title: Chair Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Chair Test: Functional test for Lateral Epicondylitis.

image:image.image:title: Reverse Cozen Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Reverse Cozen Test: Diagnosing Medial Epicondylitis (Golfer's Elbow).

image:image.image:title: Elbow Range of Motion Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Elbow Range of Motion: Measuring functional and physiological limits of the elbow joint.

image:image.image:title: Bicipital Aponeurosis Flex Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Bicipital Aponeurosis Flex Test: Confirming complete distal biceps rupture (checking if the aponeurosis is intact).

image:image.image:title: Ober's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ober's Test: Assessing tightness (contracture) of the Iliotibial Band (ITB) and Tensor Fasciae Latae (TFL).

image:image.image:title: Noble Compression Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Noble Compression Test: Diagnosing Iliotibial Band Friction Syndrome (Runner's Knee).

image:image.image:title: Thomas Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Thomas Test: Assessing Hip Flexor Contracture (tightness of Iliopsoas, Rectus Femoris, or TFL).

image:image.image:title: Staheli Test (Prone Hip Extension) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Staheli Test (Prone Hip Extension): Assessing Hip Flexion Contractures (specifically Iliopsoas).Often used when the Thomas Test is ambig

image:image.image:title: Ely's Test (Duncan-Ely) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ely's Test (Duncan-Ely): Assessing spasticity or tightness of the Rectus Femoris.

image:image.image:title: Patrick's Test (FABER) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Patrick's Test (FABER): Screening for hip joint pathology vs. Sacroiliac (SI) joint dysfunction.FABER: Flexion, ABduction, E

image:image.image:title: FADDIR Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for FADDIR Test: Diagnosing Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) and Anterior Labral Tears.FADDIR: Flexion, ADDuction,

image:image.image:title: Log Roll Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Log Roll Test: Screening for intra-articular hip pathology (synovitis, infection, fracture) without stressing muscl

image:image.image:title: Stinchfield Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Stinchfield Test: Differentiating between Hip Joint pathology and Lumbar/SI issues.

image:image.image:title: Hip Scour Test (Quadrant) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Hip Scour Test (Quadrant): Detecting arthritis, labral tears, or capsular defects (inner and outer quadrants).

image:image.image:title: Trendelenburg's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Trendelenburg's Test: Identifying weakness of the Gluteus Medius (Hip Abductors).

image:image.image:title: Craig's Test (Ryder Method) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Craig's Test (Ryder Method): Measuring Femoral Anteversion (internal twist of the femur).

image:image.image:title: Pelvic Drop Test (Step-Down) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Pelvic Drop Test (Step-Down): Assessing core and hip stability (similar to Trendelenburg but dynamic).

image:image.image:title: Hip Range of Motion Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Hip Range of Motion: Measuring physiological limits of the hip joint.

image:image.image:title: Ortolani's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ortolani's Test: Reducing a dislocated hip in newborns with Developmental Dysplasia of the Hip (DDH).

image:image.image:title: Barlow's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Barlow's Test: Provoking dislocation in an unstable hip (Newborn DDH).

image:image.image:title: Patellar-Pubic Percussion Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Patellar-Pubic Percussion Test: Detecting Occult Hip Fractures when X-rays are negative.

image:image.image:title: Fulcrum Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Fulcrum Test: Detecting Femoral Shaft Stress Fractures.

image:image.image:title: Pelvic Ligament Stress Tests Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Pelvic Ligament Stress Tests: Pain provocation for Sacroiliac (SI) and pelvic ligaments (Iliolumbar, Sacrotuberous).

image:image.image:title: Lachman Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Lachman Test: Assessing the integrity of the Anterior Cruciate Ligament (ACL), specifically the posterolateral bun

image:image.image:title: Anterior Drawer Test (Knee) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Anterior Drawer Test (Knee): Assessing the Anterior Cruciate Ligament (ACL) (anteromedial bundle).

image:image.image:title: Pivot Shift Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Pivot Shift Test: Diagnosing Anterolateral Rotatory Instability (ACL + lateral capsule injury).Replicates the “g

image:image.image:title: Posterior Drawer Test (Knee) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Posterior Drawer Test (Knee): Assessing the integrity of the Posterior Cruciate Ligament (PCL).

image:image.image:title: Posterior Sag Sign (Godfrey's Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Posterior Sag Sign (Godfrey's Test): Visual assessment of PCL integrity.

image:image.image:title: Quadriceps Active Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Quadriceps Active Test: Confirming PCL Rupture.

image:image.image:title: Dial Test (Tibial External Rotation) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Dial Test (Tibial External Rotation): Differentiating between isolated Posterolateral Corner (PLC) injury and combined PCL + PLC injury.

image:image.image:title: Valgus Stress Test (Knee) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Valgus Stress Test (Knee): Assessing the Medial Collateral Ligament (MCL).

image:image.image:title: Varus Stress Test (Knee) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Varus Stress Test (Knee): Assessing the Lateral Collateral Ligament (LCL).

image:image.image:title: Apley’s Distraction Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Apley’s Distraction Test: Distinguishing ligamentous injury from meniscal injury.

image:image.image:title: McMurray’s Test (Medial) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for McMurray’s Test (Medial): Diagnosing tears of the Posterior Horn of the Medial Meniscus.

image:image.image:title: McMurray’s Test (Lateral) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for McMurray’s Test (Lateral): Diagnosing tears of the Lateral Meniscus.

image:image.image:title: Apley’s Compression Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Apley’s Compression Test: Diagnosing Meniscal Tears.

image:image.image:title: Thessaly Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Thessaly Test: Dynamic reproduction of meniscal loading (considered more accurate than McMurray's).

image:image.image:title: Ege's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ege's Test: Functional loading test for Meniscal Tears.

image:image.image:title: Bounce Home Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Bounce Home Test: Detecting Meniscal Tears or loose bodies blocking extension.

image:image.image:title: Patellar Apprehension Test (Fairbank’s) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Patellar Apprehension Test (Fairbank’s): Assessing history of Lateral Patellar Dislocation.

image:image.image:title: Patellofemoral Grind Test (Clarke’s Sign) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Patellofemoral Grind Test (Clarke’s Sign): Detecting Chondromalacia Patella or Patellofemoral Pain Syndrome (PFPS).

image:image.image:title: Waldron’s Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Waldron’s Test: Assessing Patellofemoral Pain Syndrome (PFPS) functionally.

image:image.image:title: Medial Plica Test (Mital & Hayden) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Medial Plica Test (Mital & Hayden): Diagnosing Mediopatellar Plica Syndrome.

image:image.image:title: Hughston’s Plica Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Hughston’s Plica Test: Diagnosing Suprapatellar Plica Syndrome.

image:image.image:title: Wilson’s Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Wilson’s Test: Diagnosing Osteochondritis Dissecans (OCD) of the medial femoral condyle.

image:image.image:title: Patellar Tap / Ballottement Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Patellar Tap / Ballottement Test: Detecting Major Knee Effusion (swelling).

image:image.image:title: Knee Range of Motion Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Knee Range of Motion: Measuring physiological limits.

image:image.image:title: Popliteal Angle Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Popliteal Angle Test: Assessing Hamstring Tightness (Contracture), commonly in Cerebral Palsy.

image:image.image:title: Garrick Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Garrick Test: Diagnosing Popliteus Tendinopathy.

image:image.image:title: Neer Impingement Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Neer Impingement Test: Diagnosing Subacromial Impingement (Supraspinatus/Biceps tendon overuse).

image:image.image:title: Hawkins-Kennedy Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Hawkins-Kennedy Test: Diagnosing Subacromial Impingement.

image:image.image:title: Coracoid Impingement Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Coracoid Impingement Sign: Diagnosing Subcoracoid Impingement (Lesser Tuberosity hitting the Coracoid).

image:image.image:title: Internal Rotation Resistance Stress Test (IRRST) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Internal Rotation Resistance Stress Test (IRRST): Differentiating Internal Impingement from Outlet Impingement.

image:image.image:title: Empty Can Test (Jobe's) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Empty Can Test (Jobe's): Assessing the Supraspinatus tendon.

image:image.image:title: Lift-Off Test (Gerber's) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Lift-Off Test (Gerber's): Diagnosing Subscapularis tears.

image:image.image:title: Hornblower's Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Hornblower's Sign: Diagnosing Teres Minor (and Infraspinatus) pathology.

image:image.image:title: Rent Test (Transdeltoid Palpation) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Rent Test (Transdeltoid Palpation): Palpating Rotator Cuff Tears.

image:image.image:title: Speed's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Speed's Test: Diagnosing Bicipital Tendinopathy or SLAP lesions.

image:image.image:title: Yergason's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Yergason's Test: Diagnosing Transverse Humeral Ligament integrity and Biceps Tendinopathy.

image:image.image:title: Active Compression Test (O'Brien's) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Active Compression Test (O'Brien's): Diagnosing SLAP Lesions or AC Joint pathology.

image:image.image:title: Crank Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Crank Test: Diagnosing Labral Tears (SLAP).

image:image.image:title: Kim Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Kim Test: Diagnosing Posteroinferior Labral Lesions.

image:image.image:title: Load and Shift Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Load and Shift Test: Grading Anterior/Posterior Instability.

image:image.image:title: Apprehension and Relocation Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Apprehension and Relocation Test: Diagnosing Anterior Instability.

image:image.image:title: Sulcus Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Sulcus Sign: Diagnosing Multidirectional Instability (MDI) and Inferior Laxity.

image:image.image:title: Jerk Test (Posterior) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Jerk Test (Posterior): Diagnosing Posterior Instability.

image:image.image:title: Shoulder Anterior Drawer Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Shoulder Anterior Drawer Test: Assessing Anterior Glenohumeral Instability.

image:image.image:title: Cross-Body Adduction Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Cross-Body Adduction Test: Diagnosing AC Joint pathology.

image:image.image:title: Wright's Test (Hyperabduction) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Wright's Test (Hyperabduction): Diagnosing Thoracic Outlet Syndrome (TOS).

image:image.image:title: Roos Test (EAST) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Roos Test (EAST): Diagnosing TOS.

image:image.image:title: Spurling's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Spurling's Test: Diagnosing Cervical Radiculopathy (compression of a nerve root in the neck).

image:image.image:title: Distraction Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Distraction Test: Confirming Cervical Radiculopathy by relieving symptoms.

image:image.image:title: Lasegue Test (Straight Leg Raise) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Lasegue Test (Straight Leg Raise): Diagnosing Sciatica or Lumbar Disc Herniation (specifically L4-S1 nerve roots).

image:image.image:title: Crossed Over Lasegue (Well Leg Raise) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Crossed Over Lasegue (Well Leg Raise): Diagnosing a Large Central Disc Herniation.

image:image.image:title: Slump Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Slump Test: Detecting Neural Tension anywhere in the spinal tract (more sensitive than the Straight Leg Raise).

image:image.image:title: Gaenslen Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Gaenslen Test: Provoking pain in the Sacroiliac Joint (SIJ).

image:image.image:title: Elvey Test (Upper Limb Tension Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Elvey Test (Upper Limb Tension Test): Screening for Cervical Radiculopathy or Peripheral Nerve Entrapment in the arm.

image:image.image:title: Shoulder Press Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Shoulder Press Test: Differentiating Nerve Root pain from Muscle/Facet pain.

image:image.image:title: Shoulder Abduction Test (Bakody) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Shoulder Abduction Test (Bakody): Diagnosing Cervical Radiculopathy (specifically C4, C5, or C6 nerve roots).

image:image.image:title: Lhermitte Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Lhermitte Sign: Screening for Cervical Myelopathy (spinal cord compression), Multiple Sclerosis, or severe Stenosis.

image:image.image:title: Prone Knee Flexion Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Prone Knee Flexion Test: Differentiating between Lumbar, SI Joint, and Femoral Nerve pathology.

image:image.image:title: Spinous Process Tap Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Spinous Process Tap Test: Screening for serious spinal pathology like Fracture, Infection, or Disc Herniation.

image:image.image:title: Lasegue Drop Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Lasegue Drop Test: Identifying Lumbar or SI pain caused by sudden muscle guarding.

image:image.image:title: Springing Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Springing Test: Assessing Segmental Mobility (Stiffness vs Instability) and Pain provocation.

image:image.image:title: Bragard Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Bragard Test: Differentiating Neural Pain from Hamstring Tightness.

image:image.image:title: Three-Phase Hyperextension Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Three-Phase Hyperextension Test: Differentiating the source of pain: Hip vs. SI Joint vs. Lumbar Spine.

image:image.image:title: Standing Flexion Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Standing Flexion Test: Assessing Sacroiliac Joint Stiffness (Hypomobility).

image:image.image:title: Derbolowsky Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Derbolowsky Test: Diagnosing Functional Leg Length Discrepancy caused by pelvic rotation.

image:image.image:title: Yeoman Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Yeoman Test: Stressing the Anterior Sacroiliac Ligaments.

image:image.image:title: Spine Range of Motion Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Spine Range of Motion: Measuring physiological limits of the spine.

image:image.image:title: Schober Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Schober Sign: Measuring Lumbar Flexion (specifically for Ankylosing Spondylitis).

image:image.image:title: Soto-Hall Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Soto-Hall Test: Differentiating between Bone/Ligament pathology and Muscle pathology in the neck.

image:image.image:title: Thigh Thrust Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Thigh Thrust Test: Provocation test for Sacroiliac Joint Dysfunction.Also called Posterior Shear Test.

image:image.image:title: Beevor Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Beevor Sign: Diagnosing weakness of T10-T12 Nerve Roots or Spinal Cord Lesion.

image:image.image:title: Femoral Nerve Stretch Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Femoral Nerve Stretch Test: Diagnosing High Lumbar Radiculopathy (L2-L4 Nerve Roots).

image:image.image:title: Alar Ligament Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Alar Ligament Test: Assessing Upper Cervical Instability (specifically the Alar Ligament which stabilizes C2).

image:image.image:title: CMC Grind Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for CMC Grind Test: Diagnosing Osteoarthritis of the Thumb Carpometacarpal (CMC) Joint.

image:image.image:title: Lunotriquetral Ballottement Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Lunotriquetral Ballottement Test: Assessing instability of the Lunotriquetral Ligament.

image:image.image:title: Watson Test (Scaphoid Shift) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Watson Test (Scaphoid Shift): Diagnosing Scapholunate Ligament Instability.

image:image.image:title: Ulnocarpal Abutment Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ulnocarpal Abutment Test: Diagnosing TFCC Tears or Ulnocarpal Impingement Syndrome.

image:image.image:title: Gamekeeper's Test (UCL Stress) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Gamekeeper's Test (UCL Stress): Diagnosing Ulnar Collateral Ligament (UCL) tears of the thumb (Skier's Thumb).

image:image.image:title: Lichtman Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Lichtman Test: Diagnosing Midcarpal Instability.

image:image.image:title: Tinel's Sign (Wrist) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Tinel's Sign (Wrist): Diagnosing Carpal Tunnel Syndrome (Median Nerve).

image:image.image:title: Phalen's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Phalen's Test: Diagnosing Carpal Tunnel Syndrome.

image:image.image:title: Froment's Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Froment's Sign: Testing Ulnar Nerve motor function (Adductor Pollicis muscle).

image:image.image:title: Wartenberg's Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Wartenberg's Sign: Diagnosing Ulnar Nerve Neuropathy.

image:image.image:title: Jeanne's Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Jeanne's Sign: Diagnosing Ulnar Nerve Paralysis.

image:image.image:title: Piano Key Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Piano Key Sign: Diagnosing Distal Radioulnar Joint (DRUJ) Instability.

image:image.image:title: Finkelstein's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Finkelstein's Test: Diagnosing De Quervain's Tenosynovitis.

image:image.image:title: Bunnel-Littler Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Bunnel-Littler Test: Differentiating Intrinsic Muscle Tightness from Joint Capsule Tightness.

image:image.image:title: Durkan's Test (Carpal Compression) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Durkan's Test (Carpal Compression): Diagnosing Carpal Tunnel Syndrome.

image:image.image:title: Elson Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Elson Test: Diagnosing Central Slip Injury (precursor to Boutonniere Deformity).

image:image.image:title: Allen Test (Vascular) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Allen Test (Vascular): Assessing Arterial Blood Flow (Radial/Ulnar Artery Patency).

image:image.image:title: Wrist Range of Motion Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Wrist Range of Motion: Measuring physiological limits.

image:image.image:title: Hand Range of Motion Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Hand Range of Motion: Measuring finger joint mobility.

image:image.image:title: Capillary Refill Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Capillary Refill Test: Assessing peripheral perfusion.

image:image.image:title: Wrist & Hand General Examination Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Wrist & Hand General Examination:

image:image.image:title: Elbow General Examination Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Elbow General Examination:

image:image.image:title: Shoulder General Examination Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Shoulder General Examination:

image:image.image:title: Foot & Ankle General Examination Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Foot & Ankle General Examination:

image:image.image:title: Knee General Examination Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Knee General Examination:

image:image.image:title: Hip General Examination Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Hip General Examination:

image:image.image:title: Navicular Drop Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Navicular Drop Test: Quantifying the amount of foot pronation (flattening) during weight-bearing.

image:image.image:title: Coleman Block Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Coleman Block Test: Differentiating between flexible and rigid hindfoot varus deformities.

image:image.image:title: Tinel's Sign (Ankle) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Tinel's Sign (Ankle): Testing for Tarsal Tunnel Syndrome (Posterior Tibial Nerve compression).

image:image.image:title: Cotton Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Cotton Test: Assessing instability of the syndesmosis (lateral talar shift).

image:image.image:title: Ottawa Ankle Rules Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ottawa Ankle Rules: Determining the need for X-rays after acute ankle injury.

image:image.image:title: Too Many Toes Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Too Many Toes Sign: Assessing for hyperpronation (flatfoot) and tibial torsion.Identifying dysfunction of the posterior

image:image.image:title: Single Leg Heel Raise Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Single Leg Heel Raise: Testing the strength and function of the Posterior Tibial Tendon.Diagnosing acquired flatfoot deform

image:image.image:title: Silfverskiöld Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Silfverskiöld Test: Differentiating between tightness in the Gastrocnemius muscle versus the Soleus muscle.

image:image.image:title: Crossed-Leg Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Crossed-Leg Test: Diagnosing Syndesmosis injury (High Ankle Sprain).

image:image.image:title: Dorsiflexion Maneuver Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Dorsiflexion Maneuver: Testing for Tarsal Tunnel Syndrome.

image:image.image:title: Figure-Eight Measurement Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Figure-Eight Measurement: Reliably quantifying ankle swelling (edema).

image:image.image:title: Mulder's Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Mulder's Sign: Diagnosing Morton's Neuroma (interdigital neuroma), typically between the 3rd and 4th toes.

image:image.image:title: Royal London Hospital Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Royal London Hospital Test: Diagnosing Achilles Tendinopathy.

image:image.image:title: Arc Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Arc Sign: Differentiating between Achilles Tendinosis (tendon degeneration) and Paratendonitis (inflammation o

image:image.image:title: Buerger’s Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Buerger’s Test: Assessing arterial blood supply to the leg (Peripheral Arterial Disease).

image:image.image:title: Peroneal Tendon Dislocation Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Peroneal Tendon Dislocation Test: Diagnosing Peroneal Tendon Subluxation or Dislocation (Snapping Ankle).

image:image.image:title: Paper Grip Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Paper Grip Test: Testing the strength of the intrinsic muscles of the foot (toe plantar flexion).Screening for intrin

image:image.image:title: Triple Compression Stress Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Triple Compression Stress Test: Diagnosing Tarsal Tunnel Syndrome (Posterior Tibial Nerve entrapment).Considered more sensitive than

image:image.image:title: Calcaneal Squeeze Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Calcaneal Squeeze Test: Diagnosing Calcaneal Stress Fractures.Differentiating heel pain sources (e.g., Plantar Fasciitis vs.

image:image.image:title: Fibular Translation Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Fibular Translation Test: Diagnosing Syndesmosis Injury (High Ankle Sprain).

image:image.image:title: Anterior Impingement Test (Molloy-Bendall) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Anterior Impingement Test (Molloy-Bendall): Diagnosing Anterior Ankle Impingement (Footballer's Ankle).Identifying soft tissue or bony entrapmen

image:image.image:title: Functional Hallux Limitus Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Functional Hallux Limitus Test: Determining if the big toe (Hallux) lacks extension specifically during weight-bearing (functional l

image:image.image:title: Shin Palpation Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Shin Palpation Test: Diagnosing Medial Tibial Stress Syndrome (MTSS / Shin Splints).

image:image.image:title: Prone Anterior Drawer Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Prone Anterior Drawer Test: Assessing the Anterior Talofibular Ligament (ATFL).Often considered more sensitive than the supine t

image:image.image:title: Dorsiflexion Compression Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Dorsiflexion Compression Test: Diagnosing Syndesmosis Injury (High Ankle Sprain).Differentiating syndesmosis pain from other ankle

image:image.image:title: Medial Subtalar Glide Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Medial Subtalar Glide Test: Assessing lateral stability of the Subtalar Joint.

image:image.image:title: Tuning Fork Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Tuning Fork Test: Screening for Stress Fractures (e.g., Tibia, Fibula, Metatarsals).

image:image.image:title: Subtalar Neutral Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Subtalar Neutral: Determining the neutral position of the rearfoot for biomechanical assessment and orthotic casting.

image:image.image:title: Elbow Varus Stress Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Elbow Varus Stress Test: Assessing the integrity of the Lateral Collateral Ligament (LCL) complex.

image:image.image:title: Tabletop Relocation Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Tabletop Relocation Test: Diagnosing Posterolateral Rotatory Instability (PLRI).Useful for patients who are too apprehensive f

image:image.image:title: Posterolateral Rotatory Drawer Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Posterolateral Rotatory Drawer Test: Testing for PLRI (Rotatory instability of the radius/ulna unit).

image:image.image:title: Prone Push-Up Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Prone Push-Up Test: Functional test for PLRI.

image:image.image:title: Resisted Supination Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Resisted Supination Test: Differentiating Tennis Elbow from Radial Tunnel Syndrome.

image:image.image:title: Reverse Mill's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Reverse Mill's Test: Diagnosing Medial Epicondylitis (Golfer's Elbow).

image:image.image:title: Biceps Crease Interval (BCI) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Biceps Crease Interval (BCI): Diagnosing Distal Biceps Tendon Rupture.

image:image.image:title: Passive Pronation Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Passive Pronation Test: Identifying a partial tear or thickening of the bicipital aponeurosis/tendon.

image:image.image:title: Triceps Squeeze Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Triceps Squeeze Test: Diagnosing Triceps Tendon Rupture.

image:image.image:title: Tinel's Sign (Elbow) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Tinel's Sign (Elbow): Diagnosing Cubital Tunnel Syndrome (Ulnar Nerve).

image:image.image:title: Elbow Flexion Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Elbow Flexion Test: Provocative test for Cubital Tunnel Syndrome.

image:image.image:title: Pressure Provocation Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Pressure Provocation Test: Diagnosing Cubital Tunnel Syndrome.

image:image.image:title: Scratch Collapse Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Scratch Collapse Test: Detecting nerve compression (Ulnar or Median).

image:image.image:title: Elbow Extension Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Elbow Extension Test: Screening for Elbow Fracture in acute trauma.

image:image.image:title: Valgus Extension Overload Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Valgus Extension Overload Test: Diagnosing Posteromedial Impingement (Pitcher's Elbow).

image:image.image:title: Carrying Angle Measurement Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Carrying Angle Measurement: Assessing skeletal alignment (Cubitus Valgus/Varus).

image:image.image:title: Modified Milking Maneuver Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Modified Milking Maneuver: Detecting Ulnar Collateral Ligament (UCL) insufficiency (specifically the posterior bundle).

image:image.image:title: Posterolateral Apprehension Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Posterolateral Apprehension Test: Screening for Posterolateral Rotatory Instability (PLRI).

image:image.image:title: Polk's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Polk's Test: Differentiating Lateral Epicondylitis from other lateral elbow pain.

image:image.image:title: Triceps Reflex Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Triceps Reflex Test: Assessing the integrity of the C7 Nerve Root and Triceps Tendon.

image:image.image:title: Biceps Reflex Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Biceps Reflex Test: Assessing the integrity of the C5-C6 Nerve Roots and Biceps Tendon.

image:image.image:title: Galeazzi Sign (Allis Sign) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Galeazzi Sign (Allis Sign): Screening for Developmental Dysplasia of the Hip (DDH) or Leg Length Discrepancy.

image:image.image:title: Telescoping Sign (Piston Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Telescoping Sign (Piston Test): Detecting a dislocated hip in a child (DDH).

image:image.image:title: 90-90 Straight Leg Raise Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for 90-90 Straight Leg Raise: Assessing Hamstring Tightness.

image:image.image:title: Thigh Thrust Test (Posterior Shear) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Thigh Thrust Test (Posterior Shear): Provocation test for Sacroiliac Joint (SIJ) dysfunction.

image:image.image:title: Gaenslen's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Gaenslen's Test: Provocation test for Sacroiliac Joint (SIJ) dysfunction.

image:image.image:title: McCarthy Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for McCarthy Sign: Diagnosing Acetabular Labral Tears.

image:image.image:title: Leg Length Measurement (True vs Apparent) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Leg Length Measurement (True vs Apparent): Differentiating True (Structural) from Apparent (Functional) Leg Length Discrepancy (LLD).

image:image.image:title: Heel Strike Test (Anvil Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Heel Strike Test (Anvil Test): Screening for Hip Fracture or severe joint pathology.

image:image.image:title: Rectus Femoris Contracture Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Rectus Femoris Contracture Test: Differentiating Rectus Femoris tightness from other hip flexors.

image:image.image:title: Abduction Test (Hart's Sign) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Abduction Test (Hart's Sign): Screening for Developmental Dysplasia of the Hip (DDH) in older infants where Ortolani is no longer

image:image.image:title: Weber-Barstow Maneuver Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Weber-Barstow Maneuver: Normalizing pelvic alignment before measuring Leg Length Discrepancy (LLD).

image:image.image:title: Supine-to-Sit Test (Long Sitting Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Supine-to-Sit Test (Long Sitting Test): Differentiating Functional Leg Length Discrepancy caused by Sacroiliac Joint (SIJ) rotation.

image:image.image:title: Gillet's Test (Marching Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Gillet's Test (Marching Test): Assessing Sacroiliac Joint Mobility (Hypomobility).

image:image.image:title: Yeoman's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Yeoman's Test: Stressing the Anterior Sacroiliac Ligaments.

image:image.image:title: Flamingo Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Flamingo Test: Provocation test for Pubic Symphysis or SI Joint lesions.

image:image.image:title: Posterior Labral Tear Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Posterior Labral Tear Test: Diagnosing Posterior Acetabular Labral Tears or instability.

image:image.image:title: Ischiofemoral Impingement Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ischiofemoral Impingement Test: Diagnosing Ischiofemoral Impingement (Quadratus Femoris crushing).

image:image.image:title: Slocum Test (Rotatory Drawer) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Slocum Test (Rotatory Drawer): Diagnosing Anteromedial (AMRI) or Anterolateral (ALRI) Rotatory Instability.This is a modification o

image:image.image:title: Jerk Test of Hughston Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Jerk Test of Hughston: Diagnosing Anterolateral Rotatory Instability (ALRI) (ACL + Lateral Capsule).Similar to the Pivot Sh

image:image.image:title: Losee Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Losee Test: Diagnosing Anterolateral Rotatory Instability (ALRI).Considered a dynamic variation of the Pivot Shi

image:image.image:title: Noyes Flexion-Rotation Drawer Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Noyes Flexion-Rotation Drawer Test: Diagnosing Anterior Cruciate Ligament (ACL) tears and ALRI.

image:image.image:title: External Rotation Recurvatum Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for External Rotation Recurvatum Test: Diagnosing Posterolateral Corner (PLC) instability or PCL injury.

image:image.image:title: Reverse Pivot Shift Test (Jakob) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Reverse Pivot Shift Test (Jakob): Diagnosing Posterolateral Rotatory Instability (PLRI).

image:image.image:title: Loomer’s Posterolateral Rotary Instability Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Loomer’s Posterolateral Rotary Instability Test: Diagnosing Posterolateral Corner (PLC) injury.

image:image.image:title: Crossover Test (Arnold) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Crossover Test (Arnold): Differentiating between Anterolateral (ALRI) and Anteromedial (AMRI) instability.

image:image.image:title: Childress Sign (Duck Walk Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Childress Sign (Duck Walk Test): Functional test for Meniscal Tears (specifically posterior horn).

image:image.image:title: Brush / Stroke Test (Swipe Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Brush / Stroke Test (Swipe Test): Detecting Minimal Knee Effusion (swelling) that Ballottement might miss.

image:image.image:title: Fluctuation Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Fluctuation Test: Detecting Large Knee Effusion.

image:image.image:title: Indentation Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Indentation Test: Differentiating Synovial Thickening from Joint Effusion.

image:image.image:title: McConnell Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for McConnell Test: Diagnosing Patellofemoral Pain Syndrome (PFPS).

image:image.image:title: Q-Angle Measurement Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Q-Angle Measurement: Assessing patellar tracking alignment.

image:image.image:title: Tubercle Sulcus Angle Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Tubercle Sulcus Angle: Assessing lateral patellar tracking (alternate to Q-angle).

image:image.image:title: Plica Stutter Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Plica Stutter Test: Diagnosing Medial Plica Syndrome.

image:image.image:title: Lever Sign (Lelli's Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Lever Sign (Lelli's Test): Diagnosing Anterior Cruciate Ligament (ACL) rupture.Effective even in patients with large legs or ac

image:image.image:title: Prone Lachman Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Prone Lachman Test: Diagnosing ACL Rupture.Useful for examiners with small hands or patients with large legs.

image:image.image:title: Adson's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Adson's Test: Diagnosing TOS (specifically Scalene muscle compression).

image:image.image:title: Allen Test (Shoulder) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Allen Test (Shoulder): Diagnosing TOS (Pectoralis Minor compression).

image:image.image:title: Costoclavicular Syndrome Test (Military Brace) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Costoclavicular Syndrome Test (Military Brace): Diagnosing TOS (Costoclavicular space compression).

image:image.image:title: Halstead Maneuver Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Halstead Maneuver: Diagnosing TOS.

image:image.image:title: AC Shear Test (Paxinos Sign) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for AC Shear Test (Paxinos Sign): Diagnosing Acromioclavicular (AC) Joint pathology.

image:image.image:title: Anterior Slide Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Anterior Slide Test: Diagnosing SLAP Lesions (Superior Labrum Anterior to Posterior).

image:image.image:title: Clunk Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Clunk Test: Diagnosing Bankart or Labral Tears.

image:image.image:title: Compression-Rotation Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Compression-Rotation Test: Diagnosing SLAP or Bankart lesions.

image:image.image:title: Pain Provocation Test (Mimori) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Pain Provocation Test (Mimori): Diagnosing SLAP Lesions.

image:image.image:title: Feagin Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Feagin Test: Diagnosing Inferior Instability (Multidirectional).

image:image.image:title: Anterior Release Test (Surprise Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Anterior Release Test (Surprise Test): Diagnosing Anterior Instability.Part of the Apprehension-Relocation cluster.

image:image.image:title: Whipple Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Whipple Test: Diagnosing Partial-Thickness Supraspinatus Tears.

image:image.image:title: Upper Cut Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Upper Cut Test: Diagnosing Biceps Tendinopathy.

image:image.image:title: Pectoralis Major Contracture Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Pectoralis Major Contracture Test: Assessing tightness of the Pectoralis Major.

image:image.image:title: Lateral Scapular Slide Test (Kibler) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Lateral Scapular Slide Test (Kibler): Diagnosing Scapular Dyskinesis and stability.

image:image.image:title: Yokum Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Yokum Test: Diagnosing Subacromial Impingement.

image:image.image:title: Posterior Impingement Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Posterior Impingement Sign: Diagnosing Internal Impingement (Posterior-Superior Glenoid Impingement).Common in throwers.

image:image.image:title: Pectoralis Minor Length Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Pectoralis Minor Length Test: Assessing tightness of the Pectoralis Minor (causes anterior scapular tilt).

image:image.image:title: Latissimus Dorsi Length Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Latissimus Dorsi Length Test: Assessing tightness of the Latissimus Dorsi.

image:image.image:title: Olecranon-Manubrium Percussion Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Olecranon-Manubrium Percussion Test: Screening for Shoulder Dislocation or Bony Injury.

image:image.image:title: ULTT 1 (Median Nerve Bias) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for ULTT 1 (Median Nerve Bias): Screening for Cervical Radiculopathy or Median Nerve tension.

image:image.image:title: ULTT 2a (Median Nerve Bias) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for ULTT 2a (Median Nerve Bias): Screening for Median Nerve tension.

image:image.image:title: ULTT 2b (Radial Nerve Bias) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for ULTT 2b (Radial Nerve Bias): Screening for Radial Nerve tension.

image:image.image:title: ULTT 3 (Ulnar Nerve Bias) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for ULTT 3 (Ulnar Nerve Bias): Screening for Ulnar Nerve tension.

image:image.image:title: Vertebral Artery Test (VBI) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Vertebral Artery Test (VBI): Screening for Vertebrobasilar Insufficiency (VBI) before performing cervical manipulation.

image:image.image:title: Sharp-Purser Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Sharp-Purser Test: Assessing Atlantoaxial Instability (Transverse Ligament rupture).Commonly used in Rheumatoid Arthrit

image:image.image:title: Jackson's Compression Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Jackson's Compression Test: Diagnosing Cervical Radiculopathy (Alternative to Spurling's).

image:image.image:title: Craniocervical Flexion Test (CCFT) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Craniocervical Flexion Test (CCFT): Assessing endurance/control of Deep Neck Flexors (Longus Colli/Capitis).Crucial for whiplash and cer

image:image.image:title: Chest Expansion Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Chest Expansion Test: Diagnosing Ankylosing Spondylitis (Costovertebral joint stiffness).

image:image.image:title: Kemp's Test (Quadrant Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Kemp's Test (Quadrant Test): Diagnosing Facet Joint Syndrome or Lateral Stenosis.

image:image.image:title: Stork Test (One-Leg Standing Extension) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Stork Test (One-Leg Standing Extension): Diagnosing Spondylolysis (Pars Interarticularis stress fracture) or Spondylolisthesis.

image:image.image:title: Segmental Instability Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Segmental Instability Test: Diagnosing Lumbar Segmental Instability.

image:image.image:title: Hoover Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Hoover Test: Diagnosing Malingering or Functional Weakness (checking if effort is genuine).

image:image.image:title: SI Joint Compression Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for SI Joint Compression Test: Provocation test for SI Joint Pain.

image:image.image:title: SI Joint Distraction Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for SI Joint Distraction Test: Provocation test for SI Joint Pain.

image:image.image:title: Sacral Thrust (Sacral Compression) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Sacral Thrust (Sacral Compression): Provocation test for SI Joint Pain.

image:image.image:title: Babinski Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Babinski Sign: Screening for Upper Motor Neuron Lesions (CNS pathology).

image:image.image:title: Ankle Clonus Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ankle Clonus Test: Screening for Upper Motor Neuron Lesions (Hyper-reflexia).

image:image.image:title: Hoffmann's Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Hoffmann's Sign: Screening for Cervical Myelopathy or Upper Motor Neuron (UMN) lesions.

image:image.image:title: Kernig's Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Kernig's Sign: Diagnosing Meningitis or Subarachnoid Hemorrhage.

image:image.image:title: Romberg Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Romberg Test: Assessing Proprioception (Dorsal Columns) vs. Cerebellar Ataxia.

image:image.image:title: TFCC Load Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for TFCC Load Test: Diagnosing Triangular Fibrocartilage Complex (TFCC) tears.

image:image.image:title: Press Test (Sit-to-Stand) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Press Test (Sit-to-Stand): Functional test for TFCC Tear.

image:image.image:title: Supination Lift Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Supination Lift Test: Diagnosing TFCC Tear.

image:image.image:title: Sweater Finger Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Sweater Finger Sign: Diagnosing Flexor Digitorum Profundus (FDP) Rupture (Jersey Finger).

image:image.image:title: Boyes Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Boyes Test: Diagnosing Central Slip Injury (Boutonniere Deformity).

image:image.image:title: Linburg-Comstock Anomaly Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Linburg-Comstock Anomaly Test: Detecting an anatomical connection between the FPL (Thumb) and FDP (Index) tendons.

image:image.image:title: Reverse Phalen's Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Reverse Phalen's Test: Diagnosing Carpal Tunnel Syndrome.

image:image.image:title: Semmes-Weinstein Monofilament Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Semmes-Weinstein Monofilament Test: The Gold Standard for testing cutaneous pressure threshold (Protective Sensation).

image:image.image:title: Two-Point Discrimination (Static) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Two-Point Discrimination (Static): Assessing Functional Sensation and innervation density.

image:image.image:title: Anatomical Snuffbox Tenderness Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Anatomical Snuffbox Tenderness: Screening for Scaphoid Fracture.

image:image.image:title: Scaphoid Compression Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Scaphoid Compression Test: Diagnosing Scaphoid Fracture.

image:image.image:title: Murphy's Sign (Lunate) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Murphy's Sign (Lunate): Diagnosing Lunate Dislocation.

image:image.image:title: Grip Strength (Dynamometry) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Grip Strength (Dynamometry): Objective measurement of overall hand function and weakness.

image:image.image:title: Pinch Strength Test Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Pinch Strength Test: Assessing intrinsic muscle strength and nerve integrity.

image:image.image:title: Finger Extension Test (Shuck Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Finger Extension Test (Shuck Test): Diagnosing Radiocarpal/Midcarpal Instability or Kienbock's Disease.

image:image.image:title: Wrinkle Test (Shrivel Test) Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Wrinkle Test (Shrivel Test): Assessing Peripheral Nerve Function (Sympathetic innervation).Used in children or uncooperative pati

image:image.image:title: Ulnar Fovea Sign Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Ulnar Fovea Sign: Diagnosing TFCC Tears (specifically foveal disruptions).

image:image.image:title: Test for Extrinsic Tightness Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Test for Extrinsic Tightness: Assessing tightness of the Extensor Muscles.

image:image.image:title: Test for Intrinsic Tightness Orthopedic Special Test
image:image.image:caption: Diagnostic guide and procedure for Test for Intrinsic Tightness: Assessing tightness of the Intrinsic Muscles (Interossei/Lumbricals).
